toni.bio:
When Toni enters play: search your library for up to 3 TCG cards and add them to your hand.

Whenever Toni declares an attack, you may reveal a Pokémon card from your hand. If you do, Toni gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

jonay.bio:
Whenever Jonay enters play, search your library for the rarest collectible and add it to your showcase.

If you control 5 or more unique items, opponents cannot draw additional cards.
